name: StoreSetting
description: Per-user customization settings for their POD storefront

owner_user_id.description: The user ID who owns this store

owner_email.description: The email of the user who owns this store

store_name.description: The public name of the store

tagline.description: A short marketing tagline for the store

logo_url.description: Optional URL for the store logo

card_style.description: Design style of the product cards

grid_columns.description: Number of columns in grid layout

show_product_type_badge.description: Whether to show the product type badge

hero_banner_url.description: Background image URL for the store hero section

hero_headline.description: Large headline for the hero section
